title: Mewnicraft
description: A mod that adds elements and spells from Star vs The Forces Of Evil
body:
This mod adds the Magic Wand from Star vs The Forces Of Evil, which allows you to perform different kinds of spells.

To select a spell, press R to open a GUI and then click on the spell you want to use; if you want, you can also change the aspect of your wand by using the command "/preferences wand", which will open another GUI from which you can select the wand you prefer.

For now you can only obtain the Magic Wand from the Creative Menu or with commands but I plan to add a way to obtain it in survival as well, though for now I'll be focusing on adding new spells. The mod works well in singleplayer and multiplayer support is planned to be added as well (you can already play in multiplayer mode but you might experience some rendering issues when you watching someone else cast a spell)

Oh and I also added Pudding Pots because why not.

That being said, go play and have fun!
